heading: El Paso Water Reclamation and Reuse Project
label: 390h–12h El Paso Water Reclamation and Reuse Project

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the appropriate State and local authorities, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of the El Paso Water Reclamation and Reuse Project to reclaim and reuse wastewater in the service area of the El Paso Water Utilities Public Service Board, El Paso, Texas.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of a project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation or maintenance of a project described in subsection (a).
